title: FRC Fraud Marker (Stage 0)
description: A marker for a CONFIRMED bad entity, shared as a salted hash. By design this schema contains NO personally identifiable information: no names, account numbers, balances, or transaction data.

hashed_id.description: Salted SHA-256 of the identifier (hex). The raw identifier is never transmitted.

entity_type.description: What kind of identifier was hashed.

marker_type.description: Why this entity is marked. Stage 0 shares only confirmed/reported fraud.

confidence.description: How firmly the contributor stands behind this marker.

reported_at.description: When the contributor confirmed the marker (UTC).

reference.description: Optional non-identifying case reference (e.g. an NCRP/1930 acknowledgement id). MUST NOT contain customer PII.
